popularStory.headline: who is Gaucher V de Chattillon
popularStory.description: Gaucher V de Châtillon, Lord of Châtillon, Count of Porcien, was constable of Champagne in 1284 and then Constable of France during the reigns of five different kings. He was also tutor to the future …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gui de Chatillon IV於1258年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾時，他的父親Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III30歲，母親Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant34歲。他於1292年6月22日與Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1317年4月6日在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特享年59歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gui de Chatillon IV于1258年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾时，他的父亲Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III30岁，母亲Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant34岁。他于1292年6月22日与Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1317年4月6日在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特享年59岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gui
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gui de Chatillon IV was born in 1258, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, was 30 and his mother, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, was 34. He married Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol on 22 June 1292, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 6 April 1317, in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 59, and was buried in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gui de Chatillon IV est né en 1258, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol le 22 juin 1292, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1317, à Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gui de Chatillon IV 1258 in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III 30 und seine Mutter Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant 34. Er hat am 22. Juni 1292 in Frankreich Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 6. April 1317 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gui de Chatillon IV è nato il nel 1258 nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol il 22 giugno 1292, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 6 aprile 1317, nel Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gui de Chatillon IVが1258年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで生まれた時，父Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol IIIは30歳，母Matilda, countess of artois of Brabantは34歳であった。1292年6月22日にフランスでMarie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Polと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1317年4月6日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフルeベントで59歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフルeベントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gui de Chatillon IV(이)가 1258년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1292년 6월 22일 프랑스에서 Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1317년 4월 6일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프e븐트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 프e븐트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gui de Chatillon IV nasceu em 1258, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol em 22 de junho de 1292, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de abril de 1317, em Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gui de Chatillon IV родился в 1258 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol 22 июня 1292 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 6 апреля 1317 г. в местности фрeвент, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности фрeвент, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gui de Chatillon IV nació en 1258, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol el 22 de junio de 1292, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 6 de abril de 1317, en Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
